goal: Find last week's Acme meeting notes, draft a follow-up email to Sarah, and create next-step tasks for the team.
userVisibleSummary: I will look up the Acme notes, summarize the implementation context, create team tasks, and prepare a follow-up email for your review.

steps.title: Find relevant Acme context

input.query: Acme Sarah implementation timeline API onboarding risks

steps.userVisibleReason: The email and tasks should be grounded in the latest Acme notes.

steps.title: Summarize Acme implementation context

input.focus: Implementation timeline, open questions, onboarding risk, and next steps for Sarah Kim at Acme Corp.

steps.userVisibleReason: A concise summary helps keep the follow-up accurate and customer-specific.

steps.title: Create next-step tasks

tasks.title: Confirm Acme technical owner
tasks.description: Ask Sarah who will own API setup and implementation coordination on the Acme side.

tasks.title: Send Acme implementation timeline
tasks.description: Share a concise rollout timeline with milestones, API setup, and onboarding checkpoints.

tasks.title: Prepare onboarding risk checklist
tasks.description: List the main setup risks and mitigation steps before the next Acme meeting.

steps.userVisibleReason: The team needs clear ownership after the meeting.

steps.title: Draft Sarah's follow-up email

input.purpose: Recap the implementation conversation, share next steps, and confirm the technical owner.

steps.userVisibleReason: The customer-facing draft should be reviewed before it is finalized.
